name: Mandarin Chicken #2
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Slivered almonds, walnuts, or grated sesame
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut wings at the first joint and discard the tips. Wash and dry on paper towel, then sprinkle lightly with garlic salt.
2. Mix cornstarch, eggs, and water in a bowl to form a smooth batter. Dip wings in batter and deep fry in oil until cooked through. Set aside while making the sauce.
3. Sweet and Sour Sauce: In a large pan that can accommodate all wings evenly, combine sugar, vinegar, water, soy sauce, catsup. Bring to a boil, stirring occasionally. As the sauce thickens, add wings and cook on medium heat, turning carefully to coat thoroughly with sauce.
4. Garnish with nuts if desired. Grated sesame adds a good flavor.
When scaling this recipe down for 15 wings, make the full sauce recipe and only scale the batter part.
